svg.title: In-house report output
svg.desc: The produced in-house occupancy report that groups reservations into arrive/depart/move-in/in-house sections, including section counts and handling for reservations spanning multiple occupancy lines.

g.text: Victoria 1 Nguyen, T. + party (4) 2 late arrival
White Bch 4 Schmidt, K. (1) — bill at desk
same reservation — continues stay, 2 of 5 nights
Totals: 3 arriving · 2 departing · 1 move · 6 in-house = 21 guests
Yellow Point Lodge — Office use only — page 1 of 1
